mapper.insert:
INSERT ALL
INTO SEOUL_BIKE_TEST ( RENTAL_DATE, RENTAL_OFFICE_NO, RENTAL_OFFICE_NAME, RENTAL_CODE, GENDER, AGE_GROUP, NUM_OF_USES, EXERCISE_AMOUNT, CARBON_AMOUNT, DISTANCE, USAGE_MINUTE ) VALUES ( TO_DATE(#{item.rentalDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), #{item.rentalOfficeNo}, #{item.rentalOfficeName}, #{item.rentalCode}, #{item.gender}, #{item.ageGroup}, #{item.numOfUses}, #{item.exerciseAmount}, #{item.carbonAmount}, #{item.distance}, #{item.usageMinute} )
SELECT * FROM DUAL
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM SEOUL_BIKE_TEST ORDER BY RENTAL_DATE DESC
